archiveTitle: Vacation homes, villas and boutique apartments.
archiveText: An SEO-friendly archive page for clients with one property or a curated collection of stays.
villa-aurora.claim: Privacy, pool and soft sunsets among olive trees and sea.
villa-aurora.summary: Independent villa for families and groups, with private garden, panoramic pool and outdoor dining area.
villa-aurora.description: Villa Aurora is a villa rental designed for guests looking for a stay near the coast without giving up space, silence and comfort. Interiors are bright, the kitchen is fully equipped and the sleeping area offers privacy even for two families. Outside, the pool, veranda and garden shape slow days between the sea, historic villages and dinners under the stars.
villa-aurora.location: Panoramic countryside, 8 minutes from the historic center
appartamento-scirocco-centro-storico.cla: Essential design in the heart of the historic center.
appartamento-scirocco-centro-storico.sum: Elegant apartment for couples or small families, steps from restaurants, artisan shops and monuments.
appartamento-scirocco-centro-storico.des: Appartamento Scirocco is a vacation apartment made for a stay with everything close at hand. The living area is welcoming, the double bedroom is quiet and the balcony opens onto the pale streets of the center. It is ideal for guests who want to walk everywhere, discover local food and reach the sea in a short drive.
casa-vacanza-maestrale.claim: Sea-view terrace for simple, luminous days.
casa-vacanza-maestrale.summary: Vacation home with terrace, two bedrooms and comfortable spaces for families looking for sea and calm.
casa-vacanza-maestrale.description: Casa Maestrale is a sea-view vacation home created for families and friends in a practical yet refined setting. The terrace is the heart of the house: breakfast happens here, books are read after the beach and dinner comes with the evening breeze. Beaches are close by, while villages, nature reserves and wineries make every day feel different.
casa-vacanza-maestrale.location: Seaside area, 450 meters from the beach
